author: o1xhack
description: Automatically creates missing daily notes - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Daily Note Plus

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Backfill modal improvements.

Changes:
- Adds quick range presets for last 7 days, last 30 days, this month, and last month.
- Presets only fill date inputs; users still confirm with Start backfill before files are created.
- Shows live inclusive range length and existing daily note count.
- Disables confirmation for invalid ranges or when there are no missing daily notes to create.
- Clamps future end dates to today and caps oversized ranges at 3650 days.
- Adds focused unit tests for preset ranges, validation, clamping, truncation, and existing-note counting.
releases.name: Daily Note Plus 0.3.0

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Patch release for startup daily note creation.

Changes:
- Skips startup creation when today's daily note already exists.
- Backfills missed startup notes from the day after the latest existing daily note, avoiding duplicate creation attempts.
- Clarifies the startup setting descriptions in README files.
releases.name: Daily Note Plus 0.2.1

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Obsidian community review cleanup release.

Changes:
- Adds punctuation to the plugin manifest description.
- Removes the deprecated builtin-modules package and uses Node builtinModules instead.
- Tightens TypeScript annotations and control flow in main.ts to address unsafe type warnings.
- Keeps nested daily note path detection from 0.1.0.
releases.name: Daily Note Plus 0.2.0

releases.author: o1xhack
releases.description:
Initial Daily Note Plus release.

Changes:
- Renames the plugin to Daily Note Plus while keeping the Obsidian plugin ID as daily-note-plus.
- Detects existing daily notes using the configured Daily Notes/Periodic Notes folder plus the full date format.
- Supports nested daily note formats such as YYYY/MM/DD and YYYY/YYYY.MM.DD when checking for missing notes.
- Preserves strict parsing so notes with extra title text are not misidentified.
releases.name: Daily Note Plus 0.1.0
